mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') THEN total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_revenue, COUNT(*) AS total_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PICKUP_COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pickup_completed, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PAYMENT_PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS payment_pending, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS canceled, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired FROM orders WHERE store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS order_date, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') THEN total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(*) AS daily_count, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS payment_completed FROM orders WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY order_date ASC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') THEN total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_revenue, COUNT(*) AS total_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PICKUP_COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pickup_completed, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PAYMENT_PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS payment_pending, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS canceled, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired FROM orders WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS order_date, COUNT(*) AS daily_count, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS payment_completed, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') THEN total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS daily_revenue FROM orders WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY order_date DESC

SELECT i.name AS item_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity, SUM(oi.order_price * oi.quantity) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN items i ON i.id = oi.item_id WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND DATE(o.created_at) = #{date} AND o.order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') GROUP BY i.id, i.name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT i.name AS item_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity, SUM(oi.order_price * oi.quantity) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN items i ON i.id = oi.item_id WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND DATE(o.created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND o.order_status IN ('PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'PICKUP_COMPLETED') GROUP BY i.id, i.name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
